title: BBAI Director Dorothy Hayes Sells 15,000 Shares on May 8, 2026
text: Director Dorothy Hayes sold 15,000 BBAI shares at $4.11 on May 8, 2026. The sale generated $61,575 in proceeds while Hayes retained 204,150 shares. Additionally, director Pamela Joyce Braden executed a notable stock sale on March 16, 2026, offloading 80,000 shares in a single transaction. Over the past 12 months, BigBear.ai has seen 18 insider sales and zero insider purchases, a pattern that market observers note can reflect diminished board confidence at current price levels. The Hayes sale occurred following BigBear.ai's Q1 2026 earnings report, with BBAI shares trading at approximately $4.18 at the time of the disposal.
